_comment: Phase C legendary quest chains -- one 3-step chain per legendary species currently in the roster (grep rarity==legendary: null_terminator, segmentation_lord, void_leviathan, thorn_ancient -- all four currently live in the Voidnet per data/regions.json). Loaded by engine/legendary_quests.py. Step 3 is always a pinned boss_battle: the legendary spawns at the top of its species level_range with stat_multiplier applied, bypassing normal spawn RNG. Victory does NOT auto-capture -- the normal capture flow (devmon battle choice [3]) still applies. `devmon quests` shows chains only for the player's unlocked regions; locked-region chains show as '???' teasers.

steps.description: Win 10 battles in the Voidnet to draw its attention.
Offer 5 Void Shards to the space between commits.
VoidLeviathan surfaces from the unfinished feature branch. Confront it.
Win 10 battles in the Voidnet to prove your persistence.
Offer 2 units of Root of All at its base.
ThornAncient's roots finally part. Confront the primordial trunk.
Win 10 battles in the Voidnet without a single crash.
Offer 6 Kernel Fragments at the edge of the routing table.
NullTerminator marks the true end of the buffer. Confront it.
Win 10 battles in the Voidnet and survive every one.
Offer 3 Void Shards and 3 Kernel Fragments to every discarded crash report.
SegmentationLord remembers every fault. Confront it.
